description: Adaptive, per-SNI DPI bypass that learns optimal TLS fragmentation per host.
notes: whyDPI needs Administrator rights to load the WinDivert driver,
which intercepts TLS/DNS at the packet layer.  Scoop installs
without elevation, but launching whydpi-tray.exe triggers a UAC
prompt because the exe is built with an embedded admin manifest.
By running whyDPI you accept the terms in DISCLAIMER.md
